items.name: dameng-select-bind-nvl
items.sql: SELECT NVL(u.name, 'N/A') AS label FROM users u WHERE u.id = :id

items.name: dameng-set-schema
items.sql: SET SCHEMA KDES

items.name: dameng-alter-session-current-schema
items.sql: ALTER SESSION SET CURRENT_SCHEMA=KDES

items.name: dameng-alter-session-current-schema-quoted-identifier
items.sql: ALTER SESSION SET CURRENT_SCHEMA="KdesMixed"

items.name: dameng-minus-set-operator
items.sql: SELECT id FROM active_users MINUS SELECT id FROM archived_users

items.name: dameng-limit-offset
items.sql: SELECT id, name FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT 2 OFFSET 2

items.name: dameng-limit-comma
items.sql: SELECT id, name FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT 2,3

items.name: dameng-top-limit
items.sql: SELECT TOP 2 id, name FROM users ORDER BY id

items.name: dameng-join-bind
items.sql: SELECT u.id, u.name, o.order_no FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = :status

items.name: dameng-insert-values-bind
items.sql: INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (:id, 'bob')

items.name: dameng-insert-values-multi-row
items.sql: INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (1, 'bob'), (2, 'alice')

items.name: dameng-insert-select
items.sql: INSERT INTO archive_users (id, name) SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE status = :status

items.name: dameng-update-bind
items.sql: UPDATE users SET name = :name, status = 'active' WHERE id = :id

items.name: dameng-delete-conditional
items.sql: DELETE FROM users WHERE id = :id AND status = 'inactive'

items.name: dameng-merge-basic
items.sql: MERGE INTO users u USING staging_users s ON (u.id = s.id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET name = s.name WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id, name) VALUES (s.id, s.name)

items.name: dameng-create-table
items.sql: CREATE TABLE users (id INT, name VARCHAR(64), created_at DATE)

items.name: dameng-create-view
items.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_users AS SELECT id, name FROM users

items.name: dameng-create-sequence
items.sql: CREATE SEQUENCE user_seq START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1

items.name: dameng-alter-table-add-column
items.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD age INT

items.name: dameng-create-index
items.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_users_name ON users (name)

items.name: dameng-drop-truncate-table
items.sql: DROP TABLE old_users; TRUNCATE TABLE users

items.name: dameng-transaction-control
items.sql: SAVEPOINT s1; ROLLBACK TO SAVEPOINT s1; COMMIT

items.name: dameng-grant-revoke
items.sql: GRANT SELECT ON users TO app_user; REVOKE SELECT ON users FROM app_user

items.name: dameng-rownum-filter
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

items.name: dameng-for-update-nowait
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE id = :id FOR UPDATE NOWAIT

items.name: dameng-q-quoted-string
items.sql: SELECT q'[Bob's order]' AS label FROM dual

items.name: dameng-set-schema-in-multi-statement
items.sql: SET SCHEMA KDES; SELECT * FROM users

expect.deparse_contains: ALTER SESSION SET CURRENT_SCHEMA = kdes; SELECT * FROM users

items.name: dameng-date-timestamp-literals
items.sql: SELECT DATE '2024-01-01' AS d, TIMESTAMP '2024-01-01 12:30:00' AS ts FROM dual

items.name: dameng-group-having-window
items.sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY status) AS rn FROM users GROUP BY status HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

items.name: dameng-top-offset-count
items.sql: SELECT TOP 2,3 id, name FROM users ORDER BY id

items.name: dameng-insert-question-params
items.sql: INSERT INTO users (username, email, age) VALUES (?, ?, ?)

items.name: dameng-update-question-params
items.sql: UPDATE users SET email = ? WHERE username = ?

items.name: dameng-exec-sql-prepare
items.sql: EXEC SQL PREPARE stmt FROM 'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?'

expect.deparse_contains: EXEC SQL PREPARE stmt FROM 'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?'

items.name: dameng-exec-sql-execute
items.sql: EXEC SQL EXECUTE stmt USING ?

items.name: dameng-exec-sql-deallocate-prepare
items.sql: EXEC SQL DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt

items.name: dameng-select-multiple-named-binds
items.sql: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE id = :id AND status = :status

items.name: dameng-select-in-named-binds
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE status IN (:status1, :status2, :status3)

items.name: dameng-insert-multiple-named-binds
items.sql: INSERT INTO users (id, name, status) VALUES (:id, :name, :status)

items.name: dameng-insert-multi-row-question-params
items.sql: INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (?, ?), (?, ?)

items.name: dameng-update-question-params-expanded
items.sql: UPDATE users SET name = ?, status = ? WHERE id = ?

items.name: dameng-delete-question-params
items.sql: DELETE FROM users WHERE id = ? AND status = ?

items.name: dameng-exec-sql-prepare-insert
items.sql: EXEC SQL PREPARE stmt FROM 'INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (?, ?)'

expect.deparse_contains: EXEC SQL PREPARE stmt FROM 'INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (?, ?)'

items.name: dameng-exec-sql-execute-named-binds
items.sql: EXEC SQL EXECUTE stmt USING :id, :name

items.name: dameng-exec-sql-execute-question-params
items.sql: EXEC SQL EXECUTE stmt USING ?, ?

items.name: dameng-view-top-direct-bind
items.sql: SELECT TOP 2 name FROM users WHERE id = :id ORDER BY created_at

items.name: dameng-view-case-expression
items.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN state = 1 THEN name ELSE fallback_name END AS label FROM users

items.name: dameng-view-group-having-order
items.sql: SELECT dept, COUNT(id) AS cnt FROM users GROUP BY dept HAVING COUNT(id) > 1 ORDER BY dept

items.name: dameng-view-update-named-binds
items.sql: UPDATE servers SET ip = :aaa, port = :port WHERE id = :id

items.name: dameng-view-join-on
items.sql: SELECT u.name FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = :status

items.name: dameng-view-nvl-function-args
items.sql: SELECT NVL(name, fallback_name) AS label FROM users WHERE id = :id

items.name: dameng-select-between-named-binds
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE age BETWEEN :min_age AND :max_age

items.name: dameng-select-not-in-named-binds
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE status NOT IN (:status1, :status2)

items.name: dameng-select-not-between-named-binds
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE age NOT BETWEEN :min_age AND :max_age

items.name: dameng-select-not-like-named-bind
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users WHERE name NOT LIKE :name_pattern

items.name: dameng-select-distinct-like-bind
items.sql: SELECT DISTINCT name FROM table1 WHERE name LIKE :name

items.name: dameng-select-distinct-nested-functions
items.sql: SELECT DISTINCT LOWER(UPPER(name)) FROM table1

items.name: dameng-delete-in-named-binds
items.sql: DELETE FROM users WHERE email IN (:email1, :email2)

items.name: dameng-update-exists-subquery
items.sql: UPDATE users u SET status = :status WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.id AND o.phone = :phone)

items.name: dameng-insert-without-column-list
items.sql: INSERT INTO users VALUES (:id, :name, :age)

items.name: dameng-create-or-replace-view
items.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_user_orders AS SELECT u.id, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id

items.name: dameng-rownum-pagination-realistic
items.sql: SELECT IP, AREACODE, AREANAME, STATE, MSTSCPORT, NTUID, NTPWD, WORKER, WEBSITE, MSDEPLOYPORT, "UID", PWD, KEY_ENCRYPTION, MODIFYTIME FROM (SELECT a.*, ROWNUM RN FROM SERVERS a WHERE ROWNUM <= :endRow) WHERE RN > :startRow

items.name: dameng-select-alias-star
items.sql: SELECT u.*, o.order_no FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = :status

items.name: dameng-limit-offset-question-params
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT ? OFFSET ?

items.name: dameng-select-from-dual-bind
items.sql: SELECT :value FROM dual

items.name: dameng-multi-statement-global-bind-position
items.sql: UPDATE users SET a = ? WHERE b = ?; UPDATE users SET c = ? WHERE d = ?

items.name: dameng-select-derived-query-graph
items.sql: SELECT s.name AS outer_name FROM (SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE age <= :age) s WHERE s.name LIKE :name

items.name: dameng-select-reference-024
items.sql: select * from (select id as aa, name as bb, department as cc FROM (select e.*,rownum as row_num from employees_uuid e where rownum <= 100) where row_num >= 1 and (id = 1 or id=2)) where aa = 1;

items.name: dameng-select-reference-026
items.sql: select b.* from (select id as aa, department as cc, name as bb FROM (select e.*,rownum as row_num from employees_uuid e where rownum <= 100) a where row_num >= 1 and (id = 1 or id=2)) b where aa = 1;

items.name: dameng-select-reference-028
items.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT e.*, ROWNUM rn FROM employees e WHERE ROWNUM <= 100) WHERE rn > 50;

items.name: dameng-select-reference-033
items.sql: select * from (select rownum as num, * from (select * from ( select b.*, rownum autorowno, c.* from PERSON b left join XQGL_XQBC c on b.ID = c.xqgl_id ) a) ) d;

items.name: dameng-select-reference-044
items.sql: select * from ( select /*+first_rows*/ z_results.*,rownum autorowno from ( select t.XQGL_ID xqdh, t.XQGL_BT xqbt, t.xqgl_lx xqlx, (select dict_name from xggl_dict c where trim(t.XQGL_LX) = c.dict_id and c.dict_type='4') xqlxmc, t.XQGL_CJRDM xqcjrdm, t.XQGL_CJRME xqcjr, t.XQGL_LXDH lxdh, t.XQGL_SWJGDM swjgdm, t.XQGL_SWJGMC swjgmc, to_char(t.XQGL_XQCJRQ,'yyyy-MM-dd') xqcjrq, to_char(t.XQGL_XQWCRQ,'yyyy-MM-dd') xqwcrq, t.XQGL_GJGQ gjgq, t.XQGL_CONTENT content, t.XQGL_FLAG flag, t.XQGL_XQQR xqqr, t.XQGL_XQFK xqfk, t.XQGL_REMARK mark, t.XQGL_REMARK1 mgzd, case when t.XQGL_REMARK1 = '1' then '是' else '否' end as mgzdmc, t.XQGL_REMARK2 mark2, t.XQGL_REMARK3 mark3, t.xqgl_zt xqzt, t.XQGL_ZTMC xqztmc, t.xqgl_ywlx ywlx, t.XQGL_YWLXMC ywlxmc, t.xqgl_fzlx fzlx, t.XQGL_FZLXMC fzlxmc, t.XQGL_QRRQ qrrq, t.XQGL_FKRQ fkrq, t.xqgl_fk_xs fkxs, case when t.XQGL_FK_XS ='1' then '书面' when t.XQGL_FK_XS ='2' then '线上' end as fkxsmc, t.XQGL_XQFK_CONTENT fkcontent, t.xqgl_xqff_zygs_id zygs, t.xqgl_xqff_xzgs_id xzgs, t.XQGL_XQFF_ZYGS zygsmc, t.XQGL_XQFF_XZGS xzgsmc, t.xqgl_xbrq xbrq, b.xqgl_bccontent bccontent, b.xqgl_bcfkcontent bcfkcontent from xqgl t left join (select * from xqgl_xqbc where xqgl_type = 'bc') b on t.xqgl_id = b.xqgl_id where t.XQGL_DELETE !='Y' and t.XQGL_CJRDM = '110' and t.XQGL_SWJGDM = '110' order by t.XQGL_XQCJRQ desc ) z_results where rownum<=20 ) where autorowno>= 1;

items.name: dameng-select-reference-045
items.sql: select * from (select /*+first_rows*/ z_results.*,rownum autorowno from ( select t.fxpcbh "XXPC_BH", decode(fa.fa_mc,'','','[' || fa.fa_mc ||'] ')||t.fxpcmc "XXPC_MC", t.fxpczt "XXPCZT_DM", (select dm.mc from rwtc_dm dm where dm.lx_dm = 'RWTCFXSCFS' and dm.dm = t.fxscfs) "FXSCFS", (select dm.mc from rwtc_dm dm where dm.lx_dm = 'RWTCFXPCZT' and dm.dm = t.fxpczt) "XXPCZT_MC", to_char(t.cjsj,'yyy-mm-dd') "LRSJ", (select c.swjgmc from wd_swjg c where c.swjg_dm = t.cjsscsdm) "LYCS", (select c.swjgmc from wd_swig c where c.swjg_dm= t.cjswjgdm) "SWJG", nv1(t.fxxxsl,0) "FXXXS", nv1(t.shtgsl,0) "FXTGSL", nv1(t.shbtgsl,0) "FXBTGSL", (select c.czry_mc from dm_czry c where c.swry_dm = t.sprdm) spr, to_char(nv1(t.cjsj,t.tssj),'yyyy-m-dd') tssj, to_char(t.spsj,'yyyy-mm-dd') spsj, t.spsm, decode(t.spyj,'Y','通过','不通过') spyj, n.file_name fileName, n.file_path filePath, n.complete_date completeDate, n.remark from rwtc_fxpc t left join rwtc_fxpc_ydzn n on t.fxpcbh = n.fxpcbh left join fxfx_sm_slb sl on sl.smsl_bh=t.fxpcbh left join fxfx_fxfa fa on sl.fa_bh=fa.fa_bh where 1=1 and t.cjswjgdm = '110' and (t.fxpczt in ('02') or t.fxxxsl = (t.shtgsl+ t.shbtgsl)) order by fxpczt asc, t.spsj desc ) z_results where rownum<=20 ) aaa where autorowno>= 1;

items.name: dameng-select-reference-048
items.sql: select * from (select * from (select CONCAT(filePath, fxpczt) as path, b.* from (select * from (select /*+first_rows*/ z_results.*, rownum autorowno from ( select t.fxpcbh "XXPC_BH", decode(fa.fa_mc,'','','[' || fa.fa_mc ||'] ')||t.fxpcmc "XXPC_MC", t.fxpczt "XXPCZT_DM", (select dm.mc from rwtc_dm dm where dm.lx_dm = 'RWTCFXSCFS' and dm.dm = t.fxscfs) "FXSCFS", (select dm.mc from rwtc_dm dm where dm.lx_dm = 'RWTCFXPCZT' and dm.dm = t.fxpczt) "XXPCZT_MC", to_char(t.cjsj,'yyy-mm-dd') "LRSJ", (select c.swjgmc from wd_swjg c where c.swjg_dm = t.cjsscsdm) "LYCS", (select c.swjgmc from wd_swig c where c.swjg_dm= t.cjswjgdm) "SWJG", nv1(t.fxxxsl,0) "FXXXS", nv1(t.shtgsl,0) "FXTGSL", nv1(t.shbtgsl,0) "FXBTGSL", (select c.czry_mc from dm_czry c where c.swry_dm = t.sprdm) spr, to_char(nv1(t.cjsj,t.tssj),'yyyy-m-dd') tssj, to_char(t.spsj,'yyyy-mm-dd') spsj, t.spsm, decode(t.spyj,'Y','通过','不通过') spyj, n.file_name fileName, n.file_path filePath, n.complete_date completeDate, n.remark from rwtc_fxpc t left join rwtc_fxpc_ydzn n on t.fxpcbh = n.fxpcbh left join fxfx_sm_slb sl on sl.smsl_bh=t.fxpcbh left join fxfx_fxfa fa on sl.fa_bh=fa.fa_bh where 1=1 and t.cjswjgdm = '110' and (t.fxpczt in ('02') or t.fxxxsl = (t.shtgsl+ t.shbtgsl)) order by fxpczt asc, t.spsj desc ) z_results where rownum<=20 ) a1 where autorowno>= 1) b));

items.name: dameng-select-reference-049
items.sql: select * from (select rownum,* from (select * from (select o.*, rownum as rnum from ( SELECT a.*, b.wenjiansxmc FROM ( SELECT x.zxsq_wj_xxgx_t_rid, x.zxsq_zmwj_t_rid AS zmwj_key, (select dm.mc from rwtc_dm dm where dm.lx_dm = 'RWTCFXSCFS' and dm.dm = x.fxscfs) fxscfs, (select dm.mc from rwtc_dm dm where dm.lx_dm = 'RWTCFXPCZT' and dm.dm = x.fxpczt) xxpczt, x.zhengmingwjdm, x.wenjiansxbm, x.fujiawjmc AS wenjianysmc, x.fujianwjsm AS wenjiansm, x.wenjianlybj, x.create_time AS chuangjiansj, z.wenjianfwqlj, z.futubj, x.yewulxbm, x.wenjianywbm FROM zxsq_wj_xxgx_t x LEFT JOIN zxsq_zmwj_t z ON x.zhengmingwjid = z.zxsq_zmwj_t_rid LEFT JOIN zxsq_dzsqqqjl_cg_t c ON x.dianzisqajbh = c.dianzisqajbh WHERE x.del_flag = '0' AND (z.del_flag = '0' OR z.del_flag IS NULL) AND x.zhengmingwjbm != '123456' AND x.zhubiaom = '789' AND x.yewulxbm = '1011' AND c.create_user_jgdm = '1213' AND x.wenjianywbm = '11' ) a LEFT JOIN zxsq_fjwjywdz_t b ON a.wenjiansxbm = b.wenjiansxbm AND a.yewulxbm = b.yewulxbm UNION SELECT NULL AS zxsq_wj_xxgx_t_rid, z.zxsq_zmwj_t_rid AS zmwj_key, NULL AS fxscfs, NULL AS xxpczt, z.zhengmingwjdm, z.wenjiansxbm, z.wenjianysmc, z.wenjiansm, z.wenjianscfs AS wenjianlybj, NULL AS chuangjiansj, z.wenjianfwqlj, z.futubj, NULL AS yewulxbm, NULL AS wenjianywbm, NULL AS wenjiansxmc FROM zxsq_zmwj_t z WHERE z.del_flag = '0' and z.test_column = '1' AND z.zxsq_zmwj_t_rid = '1' ) o )) b) d;

items.name: dameng-select-reference-046
items.sql: SELECT a.*, b.wenjiansxmc FROM ( SELECT x.zxsq_wj_xxgx_t_rid, x.zhengmingwjid AS zmwj_key, x.zhengmingwjdm, x.wenjiansxbm, x.fujiawjmc AS wenjianysmc, x.fujianwjsm AS wenjiansm, x.wenjianlybj, x.create_time AS chuangjiansj, z.wenjianfwqlj, z.futubj, x.yewulxbm, x.wenjianywbm FROM zxsq_wj_xxgx_t x LEFT JOIN zxsq_zmwj_t z ON x.zhengmingwjid = z.zxsq_zmwj_t_rid LEFT JOIN zxsq_dzsqqqjl_cg_t c ON x.dianzisqajbh = c.dianzisqajbh WHERE x.del_flag = '0' AND (z.del_flag = '0' OR z.del_flag IS NULL) AND x.zhengmingwjbm != '123456' AND x.zhubiaom = '789' AND x.yewulxbm = '1011' AND c.create_user_jgdm = '1213' AND x.wenjianywbm = '11' ) a LEFT JOIN zxsq_fjwjywdz_t b ON a.wenjiansxbm = b.wenjiansxbm AND a.yewulxbm = b.yewulxbm;

items.name: dameng-select-reference-047
items.sql: SELECT a.*, b.wenjiansxmc FROM ( SELECT x.zxsq_wj_xxgx_t_rid, x.zxsq_zmwj_t_rid AS zmwj_key, x.zhengmingwjdm, x.wenjiansxbm, x.fujiawjmc AS wenjianysmc, x.fujianwjsm AS wenjiansm, x.wenjianlybj, x.create_time AS chuangjiansj, z.wenjianfwqlj, z.futubj, x.yewulxbm, x.wenjianywbm FROM zxsq_wj_xxgx_t x LEFT JOIN zxsq_zmwj_t z ON x.zhengmingwjid = z.zxsq_zmwj_t_rid LEFT JOIN zxsq_dzsqqqjl_cg_t c ON x.dianzisqajbh = c.dianzisqajbh WHERE x.del_flag = '0' AND (z.del_flag = '0' OR z.del_flag IS NULL) AND x.zhengmingwjbm != '123456' AND x.zhubiaom = '789' AND x.yewulxbm = '1011' AND c.create_user_jgdm = '1213' AND x.wenjianywbm = '11' ) a LEFT JOIN zxsq_fjwjywdz_t b ON a.wenjiansxbm = b.wenjiansxbm AND a.yewulxbm = b.yewulxbm UNION SELECT NULL AS zxsq_wj_xxgx_t_rid, z.zxsq_zmwj_t_rid AS zmwj_key, z.zhengmingwjdm, z.wenjiansxbm, z.wenjianysmc, z.wenjiansm, z.wenjianscfs AS wenjianlybj, NULL AS chuangjiansj, z.wenjianfwqlj, z.futubj, NULL AS yewulxbm, NULL AS wenjianywbm, NULL AS wenjiansxmc FROM zxsq_zmwj_t z WHERE z.del_flag = '0' AND z.zxsq_zmwj_t_rid = '';

items.name: dameng-field-match-kind-direct-and-expression
items.sql: SELECT id FROM KDES.DBP_CRYPTO_TEST WHERE secret = :plain_secret AND UPPER(secret) = :upper_secret

items.name: dameng-connect-by
items.sql: SELECT id FROM users START WITH manager_id IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR id = manager_id

items.name: dameng-pivot
items.sql: SELECT * FROM sales PIVOT (SUM(amount) FOR quarter IN ('Q1' AS q1))

items.name: dameng-returning-into
items.sql: INSERT INTO users (id) VALUES (1) RETURNING id INTO :id

items.name: dameng-dmsql-block
items.sql: BEGIN NULL; END;

items.name: dameng-top-percent
items.sql: SELECT TOP 10 PERCENT id FROM users ORDER BY id

items.name: dameng-insert-all
items.sql: INSERT ALL INTO users (id) VALUES (1) INTO users (id) VALUES (2) SELECT 1 FROM dual

items.name: dameng-database-link
items.sql: SELECT * FROM users@remote_db

items.name: dameng-national-q-quoted-string
items.sql: SELECT nq'{Alice's order}' AS label FROM dual

items.name: dameng-alter-session-other-parameter
items.sql: ALTER SESSION SET NLS_DATE_FORMAT = 'YYYY-MM-DD'

items.name: dameng-create-procedure
items.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE p AS BEGIN NULL; END;

items.name: dameng-top-with-ties
items.sql: SELECT TOP 2 WITH TIES id FROM users ORDER BY id

items.name: dameng-alter-session-container
items.sql: ALTER SESSION SET CONTAINER = CDB$ROOT
